hero.title: Smart Gardening, Professional Care
hero.subtitle: Advanced gardening services for gardens that thrive long-term
hero.tagline: Periodic garden maintenance · Hydroponic systems · Pergola construction
hero.cta: Leave your details to schedule a visit

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: We are a gardening business with a modern approach to garden design and care. Our work combines plant-growing expertise, an understanding of local climate conditions, and advanced cultivation methods including hydroponics. Our goal is to create gardens that feel natural, alive, and pleasant to spend time in — using efficient and smart working methods.

values.title: Smart Sustainability
values.text: Advanced eco-friendly gardening methods, including water-efficient hydroponic systems

values.title: Professionalism
values.text: Personalised planning for every garden — whether a home garden, patio, or balcony

values.title: Ongoing Support
values.text: Garden design is just the beginning — we're here for maintenance and periodic care long-term

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Modern gardening solutions for every garden and every season

items.title: Periodic Garden Maintenance
items.description: Professional garden maintenance including plant pruning and shaping, pest and disease treatment, fertilisation, seasonal planting, and irrigation system checks.

items.title: Hydroponic Systems
items.description: Design and installation of hydroponic systems for gardens, balconies, and patios. Water-efficient plant growing with fast, healthy growth — including training and ongoing guidance.

items.title: Pergola Construction & Garden Design
items.description: Planning and building pergolas that blend naturally with garden design, creating shaded seating areas and integrating climbing plants.

items.title: Garden Design
items.description: Custom garden design tailored to your space, style, and budget. Gardening solutions that allow plants to develop naturally and efficiently.

items.title: Seasonal Planting
items.description: Fresh seasonal flowers and plants to keep your garden vibrant and beautiful all year round, adapted to the local climate.

items.title: Tree & Shrub Pruning
items.description: Professional pruning and shaping of trees and shrubs to maintain the health of your greenery and the beauty of your garden long-term.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A clear, professional process from the first meeting to the final result

steps.title: Initial Conversation
steps.description: We listen to your needs and understand the garden you're dreaming of.

steps.title: Site Visit & Survey
steps.description: We visit the garden, assess the site conditions and local climate characteristics.

steps.title: Custom Plan
steps.description: We propose a tailored gardening solution — design, hydroponics, pergola, or ongoing maintenance.

steps.title: Build & Execute
steps.description: We carry out the work to a high standard, on time and with attention to every detail.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: We continue to care for the garden as needed, so it stays beautiful and healthy long-term.

items.name: Sarah Cohen
items.text: They completely transformed our backyard. The team was professional, creative, and finished on time. Their gardening services are on another level!

items.name: David Levi
items.text: Excellent service from start to finish. The garden design we received suits our lifestyle perfectly. Highly recommended!

items.name: Maya Shapiro
items.text: The hydroponic system they installed has saved us so much water and time. The garden has never looked better. Thank you!

contact.title: Want to upgrade your garden?
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll get back to you to schedule a no-obligation meeting

footer.tagline: Smart gardening, professional care, gardens that thrive long-term
